code: const LAUNCH_DATE_KEY="shoplivebharat.launchDate";const DEFAULT_LAUNCH_DATE="2026-06-13T00:00:00.000Z";export function getStoredLaunchDate(){if(typeof window==="undefined"){return DEFAULT_LAUNCH_DATE;}const stored=window.localStorage.getItem(LAUNCH_DATE_KEY);if(stored)return stored;window.localStorage.setItem(LAUNCH_DATE_KEY,DEFAULT_LAUNCH_DATE);return DEFAULT_LAUNCH_DATE;}export function storeLaunchDate(launchDate){if(!launchDate||typeof window==="undefined")return;window.localStorage.setItem(LAUNCH_DATE_KEY,launchDate);}
